title: Droplet Microarray Based on Superhydrophobic-Superhydrophilic Patterns for Single Cell Analysis.
author: Jogia GE Tronser T Popova AA Levkin PA
content: S-EPMC5197947 PMC5197947 Droplet Microarray Based on Superhydrophobic-Superhydrophilic Patterns for Single Cell Analysis. Single-cell analysis provides fundamental information on individual cell response to different environmental cues and is a growing interest in cancer and stem cell research
